tasks.subject: Task 1: Move files into model/ and ui/, rewire imports
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Relocate the domain and shared-presentational files into `model/` and `ui/` subfolders and update every affected import (internal relative paths + the host `ui.css` style entry), with the full existing suite still green.

**Files:**
- Move (git mv) -> model/: flow-model.ts, flow-options.ts, flow-schema.ts(+spec), create-flow-form.ts(+spec), flow.service.ts(+spec)
- Move (git mv) -> ui/: error-banner.ts(+spec), field-error.ts(+spec), step-indicator.ts, ui.css
- Modify (imports): multi-step-flow.ts, multi-step-flow.spec.ts, steps/profile-step.ts, steps/account-step.ts, steps/tos-step.ts, steps/steps.spec.ts
- Modify (external): apps/tommy/host/project.json (ui.css path)
- Unchanged: multi-step-flow.html, multi-step-flow.css, src/index.ts, steps/ location

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- lib/ root contains only multi-step-flow.{ts,html,css,spec.ts} + model/, ui/, steps/ dirs
- model/ has 8 domain files; ui/ has 6 presentational/style files incl ui.css
- no stale imports (./flow-*, ./error-banner, ./field-error, ./step-indicator at container; ../flow-*, ../field-error in steps/)
- apps/tommy/host/project.json references .../src/lib/ui/ui.css
- test (31) + lint + AOT host build pass

**Verify:** `pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form && pnpm nx lint tommy-multi-step-form && pnpm nx build tommy-host`

```json:metadata
{"files": ["libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.ts", "libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/multi-step-flow.spec.ts", "libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/profile-step.ts", "libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/account-step.ts", "libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/tos-step.ts", "libs/tommy/multi-step-form/src/lib/steps/steps.spec.ts", "apps/tommy/host/project.json"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm nx test tommy-multi-step-form && pnpm nx lint tommy-multi-step-form && pnpm nx build tommy-host", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lib root has only container + model/ui/steps dirs", "model/ has 8 domain files, ui/ has 6 incl ui.css", "no stale relative imports", "host project.json references ui/ui.css", "test+lint+AOT build pass"]}
```
